title: Xenial sour Greek long-bean Tagine
description: A sour and savory Greek dish featuring long-beans, cooked in a tagine with a blend of spices, perfect for a date night, and jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: long-beans
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 2 inch pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the long-beans, lemon juice, tomato paste, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the pitted dates and water, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the tagine, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice.
